name: caller-promises
description: Caller-side commitments with includeCaller=true: the customer promises to send documents and call back. Expect both caller tasks plus the one agent task.

dialogue.content: Hannon & DePalma, this is Dana. How can I help?
Hi Dana, it's Robin Mercer about my consultation next week.
Hi Robin. Before we meet, we still need your financial disclosure documents.
Right, sorry. I'll email you the financial disclosure documents by Monday.
Thank you. I'll prepare the draft agreement for our meeting once those come in.
Great. And I'll call back Friday to confirm the meeting time.

expect.quote_contains: email you the financial disclosure documents by Monday
